title: DURACELL CR123 (2 Pack) High Power Lithium Battery 3V (CR123A / CR17345) – Long life guarantee – For Cameras, Flashlights, Smoke Detectors & Small Devices – 10–Year Storage Guarantee - Leak Prevention
features: SUITABLE FOR A WIDE RANGE OF DEVICES: Duracell CR123 high power lithium batteries 3V (CR123A / CR17345) are ideal for your cameras, flashlights, smoke detectors and other small electronic devices
LONG LIFE GUARANTEED: you can be confident these batteries will be ready when you need them
10 YEARS IN STORAGE GUARANTEED: Our technologies keep unused batteries fresh for up to 10 years in their packaging
LEAKAGE PREVENTION: helps prevent our specialty batteries from leakage
RELIABLE batteries for your specialty devices
description: Product Description DURACELL CR123 high power lithium batteries are long life guaranteed for your specialty devices. They are suitable for use in cameras, flashlights, smoke detectors and other small electronic devices. With 10 years in storage, you can be confident they will be ready when you need them. Safety Warning Caution: The battery may explode or leak when heated, disassembled, short-circuited, recharged, exposed to high temperatures or misused. Do not mix old and new batteries, different brands or types. Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. If swallowed, consult a doctor immediately. Legal Disclaimer Product is sourced and shipped from the European Economic Area (EEA). Product is genuine original from manufacturer authorized distributors. Box Contains Duracell Ultra DL123 M3 3 V camera battery (1 pack of 2 batteries) Manufacturer Contact Information Spencer House 23 Sheen Road, Floor 3 Richmond Tw9 1Bn See more
